Ball of Golem Clay  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: AMMO
Charges: Unlimited
Recommended level of 62.
Effect: Illusion Earth Elemental (Any Slot, Casting Time: 6.0)
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Ball of Golem Clay
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: AMMO
Charges: Unlimited
Recommended level of 62.
Effect: Illusion Earth Elemental (Any Slot, Casting Time: 6.0)
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Illusion
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Ganlron
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-13 22:49:08
Page Updated:Sat Apr 24th, 2010

Expansion: Planes of Power
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 65
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Vegarlson, the Earthen Badlands
NPC Name
A Korascian Warlord
Fabled A Korascian Warlord


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Vegarlson, the Earthen Badlands


Uploaded August 14th, 2012 by Tobynn
Updated December 21st, 2025
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
2024 Agnarr Server, 30 named, 29 cloaks, One Ball.
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2024 at 2:47 PM Rating: Decent
ExedorDruid
Scholar
24 posts
Finally got it. I think it was the 30th named kill.

The good news is that the named spawns a LOT.

Trigger all 5 traps and the 5th one you trigger will always be either the named or a placeholder (hunter) that does not corpse-camp or despawn like the young frogs do.

Recommend using a rogue with SoS or a monk or SK with FD to trigger the traps so you dont have to fight a jillion mobs and to maximize churn.

Up the hill behind the static spawn gator near the southern most trap spot is a safe spot to park boxes / groupmates.

Put the fourth young frog on xtar and when he despawns you know the cycle is ready to repeat.
▲ Page top
Finally got it!

# Jun 28 2023 at 6:25 PM Rating: Decent

▲ Page top
Frog Trap Spawns
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2022 at 3:08 PM Rating: Decent
Allustrial
6 posts
Five locations, all marked on current edition of Brewell's maps.

Frog dispensers reloaded every 16 minutes with just myself and box in zone.
▲ Page top
Still Drops
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2018 at 10:58 AM Rating: Good
Satranik
1 post
8/15/2018
Looted this item last night. There are multiple options and opinions on getting the warlord to spawn but for me I killed all of the trap frogs along the locs provided below and after some time A Korascian Warlord popped. I am a level 86 Shaman with modest gear, J5 tank merc and pet and the fight was trivial (as you would expect given gear/level). He was level 68 and used Acid Jet a couple of times and Froaking Mist once. If you are in level range (solo or group) I highly recommend clearing the area around the traps before tripping them as there are a few mobs such as armadillos, basilisks and elementals both roaming and static through the path.

P 722.7369, 1249.4973, -44.4496, 240, 0, 0, 3, Frog_Trap
P 762.8552, 441.2773, 24.1308, 240, 0, 0, 3, Frog_Trap
P 698.9662, 622.4436, 32.2127, 240, 0, 0, 3, Frog_Trap
P 665.8143, 1054.7626, 0.0020, 240, 0, 0, 3, Frog_Trap
P 741.4619, 860.9343, 33.8288, 240, 0, 0, 3, Frog_Trap

Good luck!
▲ Page top
Still Drops
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2019 at 6:11 PM Rating: Decent
wudadin
Scholar
37 posts
Confirmed, I popped the traps today and killed two warlords, second one dropped the Ball of Golem Clay.

I had a lvl 71 monk with a merc. the fight was trivial, maybe lasted a little over a minute per warlord.

server: Povar

▲ Page top
evading me
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2007 at 1:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591904796116
28 posts
just wanted to say 350 warlord kills in my lifetime and 0 clicky. I spent months a while ago camping and i kept count, i said if i hit 200 im going to quit which i did. Then i got the itch again i still kept count but was off an on camping 30 mins heres 2 hours there, regularly irregular camping i guess you could say. Did that for 100 tries, now im camping it straight again been 50 kills and still nothing so 250 kills were straight perma camping and 100 kills were just off an on. So if your feelin unlucky look on the brightside least your not as unlucky as me. Shootin for 500 kills
▲ Page top

Poped 4 traps and 5th was either Hunter or Warlord... Dropped alots of cloaks then one Ball of Golem Clay......

Ball of Golem Clay
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2007 at 1:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591921595209
1 post
Just got this today, 3/1/07.

Cleared some trash and started at the trap on the corner of the temple near the ZI. Head directly south killing trash and you'll go over 4 traps or so.

Warlord spawned from the last trap just over the ledge and dropped the Ball of Golem Clay and a Spectral Parchment.

Traps
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2006 at 1:21 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591788040367
Scholar
34 posts
Went for this yesterday. Cleared all the traps six times. Every single time the trap actually on the ledge itself spawned the Warlord, six times out of six. All of the other frog traps spawned a "Young Frog" every time.

The trap on the ledge is between the two trees that are right next to each other, a small way in from the zone wall, right on the ledge itself.

Fifth and sixth Warlords both had the clay.

vashra
Scholar

Back in the days before the revamp of CT, there used to be a golem who dropped balls of golem clay (orbs? of golem clay) ... they were I think 3 charges and expendable and gave illusion earth elemental (the *old* graphic hehe).

...

Then they screwed with CT and moved all the 35ish mobs outside. I don't know if the old CT golem still pops out there or not. But if he does, is the expendable version of this clicky still in the game?

▲ Page top
Very rare drop
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2005 at 10:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256119042
5 posts
I have killed The warlord over 30 times now and no illusion clicky. He is spawned from trap mobs. Trigger the traps around the ledge camp. There are about 6 trap spots to trigger which you can do easily. I 2box a shm and sk there. They have anguish gear and such but you could do with lesser gear pretty easy. One day he will drop it I hope.

Place holder is normally a Yound Frog and one other frog. The traps pop shortly after you walk over them. Kill the ph, trigger again in a bit and keep it up till he spawns.

Edited, Sun Nov 20 22:43:40 2005
▲ Page top
RE: Very rare drop
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2006 at 3:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755760262
View User Forum
68 posts
The only mob you need to kill after traps go off are the Hunters, the young frogs poof just before reset.

I up to 44 kills now and still no ball.
▲ Page top
RE: Very rare drop
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2006 at 6:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258027798
78 posts
There are actually only 5 traps. They go up in a line northwards from the ledge. Last one is right and the right hand corner of the temple.

Camp
QuoteReply
# May 09 2004 at 4:26 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592258083205
View User Forum
614 posts
The Frog that drops this is spawned by setting off a trap, in Plane of Earth, after zoning inf if you follow left wall to the "Ledge" camp and look straight out there are mobs everywhere. I think it is if you step out ontop of where the normal frog spawns A Korascian Warlord will pop. He doesnt have to many HP for a named and his AE is easily ressisted. I have killed him twice, once we got this the other time we got the cloak.

Edited, Tue Aug 10 15:57:04 2004
